## What does this PR do?


## Type of change
- [ ] New provider
- [ ] Provider update (limits, endpoint, status)
- [ ] New feature / tool
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Checklist
- [ ] I've tested my changes (`python main.py scan` or `python main.py list`)
- [ ] README is regenerated if providers changed (`python main.py report`)
- [ ] New examples are self-contained and runnable
